titleStmt.title: SII 16.313: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 313. (A.R. No. 286 of 1905.) VEṄKAṬĀDRIPĀḶEM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a huge pillar lying at the entrance of the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.
The record is dated Śaka 1536 expressed by the chronogram rasa-rāma-bāṇaśaśi, Ānanda, Āshāḍha śu. 11, Thursday regularly corresponding to 1613 A.D., July 7, °43.

The inscription in Sanskrit verse registers a gift of the four villages Guṟrapusāla, Chennarāyapalle, Gāraladinna and Kaṭarivānipalli to god Chennakēśava by Gaṅgapanāyaka of Māḍāla-gōtra, son of Veṅkaṭādri and grandson of Gaṅga of the family of Rāyapa-nāyaka. The gift villages are said to have been situated in Dūpāṭi-sīma to the east of Śrīśaila. The donor is described as ruling Śrīgiri-maṇḍala.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrībhūmīpariraṁbhajāta pulaka prōddāma bāhāṁ ttarō nīlāṁbhōnidhibhāsivigrahataṭiRead bāhvaṁtarō .
tsaṁkāśahēmāṁbaraḥ . bhaktastōmacatuḥpuma¨rthakalanēhastaiścatu¨rbhi¨ryutō nityaṁ rājati vēṁ
kkaṭādrinagarē śrīcaṁnnarāyō hari[ḥ .] svastiśrī jayamaṁggaḷābhyudaya sa¨rvābhīṣṭa nityō
tsavē śrēyassaṁtati śālivāhana śakē vikhyātava¨rṣakramē . saṁvṛttē rasarāmabāṇaśaśi
kē cānaṁdasaṁvatsarē cāṣāḍē sitapakṣaviṣṇudivanē dēvējyavārānvitē . 2 .
śrīmadrājavarādhirājaramaṇē vīrapratāpōdayē śrīrājanyavarēśvarē gha
nagirau śrīratnasiṁhāsanē . śrīmadvēṁkaṭa dēvarāyatilakē rājēṁdracūḍā
maṇau dēvabrāhmaṇarakṣaṇāya pṛthivīsāmrājyamātanvati . 3 . śrīnētu¨rnikhilā
ṁḍḍakōṭi gaṇita brahmaṁḍabhāṁḍēśitu¨rnānāvēdatadaṁtavēdyamahimāna
ṁdāmṛtāṁbhōnidhau . prōdyadvaibhavacaṁnakēśavaharēḥ śrīpādapadmadvayē
sēvātatparamānasārya caraṇāṁbhōjāta śēvāparaḥ . . śrīmatrā(drā)yapa
nāyakānvayamaṇē ¨rgaṁggakkṣamādhīśituḥ . pautraḥ śrīgirimaṁḍḍalā
vanacaṇaḥ śrīveṁkaṭādriprabhōḥ . putrō gaṁgapanāyaka ssucaritō mā
ḍālagōtrōdbhavaḥ kṛtvā grāmasama¨rpaṇaṁ racayati sthittyai śilāśāsanaṁ . 5 .
madvaṁśya bāhuvaibhava saṁttata paripālitāti sasyāḍyē . śrīśailapūrva bhā
gē dūpāṭīnāmasīmani khyātaṁ . guṟrapusālagrāmaṁ tadgrāsaṁ caṁnnarā
yapalyākhyaṁ . gāraladiṁnnagrāmaṁ grāmaṁ ca kaṭarivānipalyā
khyaṁ . nidhinikṣēpajalādibhiranvitān satata�ṣṭabhi¨rbhōgaiḥ . kūpārā
mataṭākai¨rnānāva¨rṇaprajābhirāpū¨rṇān . grāmānētāṁścatura ssama¨rpya ni
tyōtsavādi sēvā¨rthaṁ . śrīcaṁnarāya divyaśrīmaccaraṇāraviṁdayugaḷā
ya . kṛtvā praṇatisahasraṁ vijñāpita mēta dīpsitaṁ hi mayā .
svāmiṁstatphalamakhilaṁ karuṇa dṛṣṭyāvadhārayākalpaṁ . paripālayaṁti yē Read karuṇā .
vai maddha¨rmaṁ tānanārataṁ pāhi . Ācaṁdratārakamidaṁ jayatu śilā
śāsanaṁ mudā racitaṁ . madvaṁśajā paramahīpativaṁśajāvā [.] yē
bhūmipā ssatata mujvaladha¨rmacitā ḥ . maddha¨rmamēva satataṁ paripālayaRead dha¨rmacittāḥ
ṁti tatpādukādvayamahaṁ si rasāvahāmi . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yōharēRead śirasā .
ta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭiṁ va¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . dānapālana
yō¨rmadhyē dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānātsva¨rgamavāpnōti pālanā da
cyutaṁ padaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 16.313 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
